RULING - A R G U E D; Thwe court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
Defendant David Ruffin, Jr.'s demurrer to the second and fourth causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff June Paoli is sustained with 20 days leave to amend as to both causes of action if Ms. Paoli in good faith can allege that there was an oral request made to her by Mr. Ruffin who will be responsible for any faiure in the contract or materials. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
